soft_step.name: Soft Step
soft_step.description: Slip lightly across softened reality, increasing evasion through dreamlike movement.

flicker_dream.name: Flicker Dream
flicker_dream.description: Strike with a flickering dream-image that may hit harder than expected—or miss entirely.

mirage_fold.name: Mirage Fold
mirage_fold.description: Fold perception around the target, distorting their sense of position and lowering accuracy.

lucid_bloom.name: Lucid Bloom
lucid_bloom.description: Bloom with sudden clarity, heightening awareness and revealing hidden battle modifiers.

probability_drift.name: Probability Drift
probability_drift.description: Shift the flow of possibility, increasing your critical chance while softening incoming crits.

phase_mirage.name: Phase Mirage
phase_mirage.description: Adopt a semi-illusory form that causes attacks to pass through with reduced impact.

dream_spiral.name: Dream Spiral
dream_spiral.description: Strike in a spiraling dream-pattern that may leave the target disoriented.

echo_of_possibility.name: Echo of Possibility
echo_of_possibility.description: Manifest an alternate-outcome echo that triggers a delayed strike from another possibility.

reverie_break.name: Reverie Break
reverie_break.description: Snap the target out of their current state, removing a buff and destabilizing their next move.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Dream technique reserved for future awakening.
